function.name: ocm_run
function.description: Run a one-shot coding task via opencode-mix. The agent will execute the task and return the result. Best for focused, well-defined tasks.

task.description: The coding task to execute (e.g. 'Fix the bug in app.py', 'Add unit tests for utils.py')

workdir.description: Working directory path for the task. Defaults to skill default_workdir if not specified.

model.description: Model override (e.g. 'enowxlabs/auto'). Uses skill default if not specified.

variant.description: Model variant for reasoning effort: high, max, minimal

function.name: ocm_session_start
function.description: Start an interactive opencode-mix session for complex multi-step coding tasks. Returns a session_id to use with ocm_session_send.

workdir.description: Working directory path for the session.

model.description: Model override. Uses skill default if not specified.

initial_message.description: Optional initial message/task to send when starting the session.

function.name: ocm_session_send
function.description: Send a prompt/message to an active opencode-mix session. Use after ocm_session_start.

session_id.description: Session ID returned by ocm_session_start (format: ses_xxx)

prompt.description: Message or task to send to the session

timeout.description: Seconds to wait for response. Defaults to skill timeout setting.

function.name: ocm_session_list
function.description: List all active opencode-mix sessions with their status.

function.name: ocm_session_stop
function.description: Stop and clean up an active opencode-mix session.
